description: A litigation paralegal is taking over a shared workstation for the 'US v. TechCorp' antitrust case. Sanitize and reconfigure the browser according to the protocol found at ~/Desktop/case_workspace_protocol.txt. This involves organizing the 22 legal bookmarks into 'Court Dockets', 'Legal Research', and 'E-Discovery' folders on the bookmark bar and deleting the 10 personal bookmarks. You must selectively purge browsing history and cookies containing the string 'globex' while preserving generic legal research history. Configure the browser with custom search shortcuts for 'usc' (https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/%s) and 'scholar' (https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%s), set the download directory to /home/ga/Documents/TechCorp_Case with the 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' setting enabled, and disable password saving and address autofill. Export the finalized bookmarks to ~/Desktop/TechCorp_Bookmarks.html.
